introSection: Familienachterbahn (English: Familycoaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Jagdmärchenpark Hirschalm in Unterweißenbach, Upper Austria, Austria.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light pink track and white supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Familienachterbahn (English: Familycoaster) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Jagdmärchenpark Hirschalm in Unterweißenbach, Upper Austria, Austria.



Light pink track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
